fixed_source: m=hexcompare;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=main():$i64{let a=s.trim(io.readln());let b=s.trim(io.readln());let la=s.len(a);let lb=s.len(b);let diff=mut.0;if(la!=lb){diff=1};let n=mut.la;if(lb<la){n=lb};let idx=mut.0;lp(idx<n){let ca=s.slice(a;idx;idx+1);let cb=s.slice(b;idx;idx+1);if(s.contains(ca;cb)=false){diff=diff+1}el{if(s.len(ca)!=s.len(cb)){diff=diff+1}};idx=idx+1};if(diff=0){io.println("EQUAL")}el{io.println("NOT_EQUAL")};<0}
